EmailTemplate.description: Reach out after sending outstanding policy payment email (live policy).
EmailTemplate.name: CA Live Policy
EmailTemplate.subject: Payment Information Required for Live Policy
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We recently contacted you about an outstanding policy payment. Unfortunately, payment remains outstanding, and we do need to discuss this with you.
Could you please call us urgently on 01242 808740. If this remains unresolved, please be aware that your policy may be affected.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
